product: Databricks SQL version 2025.30 is now available in Preview
tagline: Databricks SQL version 2025.30 is now available in the Preview channel.
what_it_does: Databricks SQL version 2025.30 is now available in the Preview channel. Review the following section to learn about new features, behavioral changes, and bug fixes. UTF8 based collations now support LIKE operator You can now use LIKE with columns that have one of the following collations enabled: UTF8 Binary, UTF8 Binary RTRIM, UTF8 LCASE, UTF8 LCASE RTRIM.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Databricks SQL version 2025.30 is now available in the Preview channel. Review the following section to learn about new features, behavioral changes, and bug fixes.
key_takeaway: Databricks SQL version 2025.30 is now available in the Preview channel.
